basic_details.job_title: Mumbai Port Authority Materials Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mumbai Port Authority Materials Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 20 April 2026 on the official website of Mumbai Port Authority. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MbPA Materials Manager Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Essential: (i) Degree or equivalent in Mechanical/Electrical Engineering from a recognised University/Institution (ii) Twelve years experience in Executive Cadre in Materials Management / Mechanical Engg. / Electrical Engineering in an Industrial/Commercial/Govt. Undertaking. Desirable: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Materials Management

selection_process: Merit based on APAR gradings (not below Very Good) Services Selection Committee (SSC)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mumbai Port Authority Materials Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mumbai Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mumbai Port Authority Materials Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Mumbai Port Authority Materials Manager recruitment is 21st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Materials Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Mechanical/Electrical Engineering and have twelve years of experience in a relevant executive cadre.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Materials Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Materials Manager post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Materials Manager role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 2,20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Materials Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Materials Manager post in the Mumbai Port Authority.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit determined by APAR gradings (not below Very Good) and through the Services Selection Committee (SSC).

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online for the Mumbai Port Authority Materials Manager recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the start date for online applications?
faq.answer: The online application process for the Mumbai Port Authority Materials Manager recruitment begins on 22nd April 2026.
